headline: Magnitude 8.2 earthquake strikes the coast of Alaska, triggering tsunami warnings.
Unprecedented monsoon rains lead to widespread flooding in Mumbai urban areas.
Category 5 Super Typhoon 'Mawar' approaches the Philippines with 250km/h winds.
Record-breaking heatwave in Western Europe causes wildfires in Portugal and Spain.
Severe drought in East Africa leads to critical water shortages for 10 million people.
Glacial lake outburst flood (GLOF) destroys critical infrastructure in the Bhutanese Himalayas.
Flash floods in the Atacama Desert leave thousands stranded in Northern Chile.
Massive landslide triggered by heavy rainfall buries entire village in Papua New Guinea.
Volcanic eruption at Mount Etna forces closure of Catania airport due to ash fall.
Coastal communities in Bangladesh face permanent displacement due to rising sea levels.
Magnitude 6.5 earthquake hits Christchurch, New Zealand, causing significant building damage.
Devastating wildfires in the Amazon rainforest reach a 10-year high in intensity.
Cyclone 'Nargis' equivalent storm surge predicted for the Irrawaddy Delta.
Heat dome over the Pacific Northwest results in record temperatures of 49°C in Lytton.
Prologued drought in Australia's Murray-Darling Basin threatens local agriculture.
Ice shelf collapse in Antarctica raises concerns about accelerated sea-level rise.
Heavy snowfall and avalanches isolate remote mountain villages in Afghanistan.
Intense dust storm blankets Beijing, reducing visibility to less than 100 meters.
Tsunami waves reach the coast of Japan following a subterranean volcanic collapse.
River Indus breaches embankments in Sindh, Pakistan, displacing millions.
Severe thunderstorm and large hail cause extensive crop damage in the US Midwest.
Drought-stricken Panama Canal imposes traffic restrictions due to low water levels.
Sudden sinkhole swallows multiple homes in Florida following heavy tropical storm.
Arctic permafrost melt releases ancient methane, accelerating local warming trends.
Wildfires in Greece force thousands to evacuate from the island of Rhodes.
Magnitude 7.1 earthquake strikes the Southern Highlands of Papua New Guinea.
Record flooding in Kentucky leaves scores missing and infrastructure destroyed.
Tropical Cyclone 'Freddy' makes history as the longest-lasting storm in the Indian Ocean.
Heatwave in India and Pakistan kills hundreds and destroys wheat harvests.
Coral bleaching event in the Great Barrier Reef hits 90% of surveyed reefs.
Massive mudslide in Freetown, Sierra Leone, caused by catastrophic deforestation.
Winter storm in Texas causes massive power grid failure and record low temperatures.
Sandstorm in the Sahara reaches as far as the Caribbean, affecting air quality.
Tidal flooding in Venice reaches second-highest level in history.
Landslide on the island of Ischia, Italy, destroys several residential buildings.
Drought in China's Yangtze River basin affects hydropower and navigation.
Cyclone 'Gabrielle' causes widespread damage across New Zealand's North Island.
Wildfires in Canada's Northwest Territories force the evacuation of Yellowknife.
Magnitude 6.8 earthquake in Morocco's High Atlas mountains kills thousands.
Flooding in Libya due to Mediterranean Storm 'Daniel' causes dam failures in Derna.
Extreme rainfall in Hong Kong leads to highest hourly precipitation in 140 years.
Wildfires in Hawaii destroy the historic town of Lahaina on Maui.
Typhoon 'Haikui' brings record flooding to Taiwan and Southern China.
Earthquake swarm in Iceland's Reykjanes peninsula precedes volcanic eruption.
Severe drought in the Amazon causes river levels to reach historic lows.
Cyclone 'Mocha' makes landfall in Myanmar, causing widespread destruction.
Floods in Slovenia affect two-thirds of the country in the worst disaster in decades.
Heatwave in Phoenix, Arizona, records 31 consecutive days above 43°C.
Wildfires in Tenerife, Canary Islands, described as the most complex in 40 years.
Earthquake magnitude 6.3 strikes Western Afghanistan, destroying dozens of villages.
Flooding in the Democratic Republic of Congo leaves hundreds dead in South Kivu.
Cyclone 'Biparjoy' forces mass evacuations in Gujarat, India, and Sindh, Pakistan.
Wildfire in Northeastern Greece is the largest ever recorded in the European Union.
Drought in Uruguay forces use of brackish water for drinking in Montevideo.
Floods in Italy's Emilia-Romagna region displace 36,000 people.
Magnitude 7.8 earthquake in Turkey and Syria causes catastrophic casualties.
Wildfires in Alberta, Canada, burn through millions of hectares of forest.
Flooding in Rwanda and Uganda kills scores and destroys mountain farmland.
Drought in Iraq jeopardizes the survival of the Mesopotamian Marshes.
Cyclone 'Ilsa' hits Western Australia as the strongest storm in 14 years.
Earthquake magnitude 6.1 hits Java, Indonesia, damaging thousands of homes.
Heavy rain in the Seoul metropolitan area causes highest flooding in 80 years.
Drought in Chile enters its 13th year, exacerbated by climate change.
Floods in South Africa's KwaZulu-Natal province lead to national state of disaster.
Hurricane 'Ian' makes landfall in Florida as a powerful Category 4 storm.
Heatwave in China lasts 70 days, the longest and most intense on record.
Flash floods in Pakistan affect 33 million people and submerge one-third of the country.
Wildfires in France and the UK occur during unprecedented 40°C heatwaves.
Earthquake magnitude 7.0 strikes Luzon, Philippines, causing landslides.
Flooding in Yellowstone National Park destroys bridges and roads.
Drought in the Horn of Africa creates the worst humanitarian crisis in 40 years.
Cyclone 'Batsirai' leaves thousands homeless in Madagascar.
Flooding in Brazil's Petrópolis results in devastating mudslides.
Earthquake magnitude 7.3 hits off the coast of Fukushima, Japan.
Wildfires in Colorado's Boulder County destroy nearly 1,000 homes in winter.
Flooding in Malaysia displaces over 120,000 people in multiple states.
Drought in Iran leads to protests over water mismanagement and scarcity.
Cyclone 'Shaheen' makes rare landfall in Oman, bringing heavy rains.
Earthquake magnitude 7.2 strikes Haiti, causing widespread damage and loss of life.
Flooding in Henan, China, sees a year's worth of rain in just three days.
Wildfires in Siberia release record amounts of carbon into the atmosphere.
Flooding in Germany and Belgium kills hundreds in catastrophic summer event.
Drought in the American West threatens water supplies for the Colorado River basin.
Cyclone 'Yaas' hits Eastern India and Bangladesh, forcing millions to shelters.
Earthquake magnitude 6.4 hits Croatia, centered near the town of Petrinja.
Flooding in New South Wales, Australia, is described as a 1-in-100-year event.
Wildfires in California become the largest in state history (August Complex).
Flooding in Central Vietnam caused by consecutive typhoons leaves thousands isolated.
Drought in Thailand leads to saltwater intrusion in the Chao Phraya River.
Cyclone 'Amphan' strikes the Sundarbans with devastating force.
Earthquake magnitude 7.0 hits the Aegean Sea, affecting Izmir, Turkey.
Flooding in Sudan reaches record levels on the Blue Nile.
Wildfires in Australia's 'Black Summer' kill billions of animals.
Magnitude 6.4 earthquake hits Puerto Rico, causing widespread power outages.
Flooding in Jakarta during New Year's Day is the deadliest in years.
Drought in Cape Town, South Africa, approaches 'Day Zero' water exhaustion.
Cyclone 'Idai' causes a humanitarian disaster in Mozambique and Zimbabwe.
Volcanic eruption on La Palma, Canary Islands, destroys over 3,000 buildings.
Flash floods in Nepal and Northern India kill dozens during monsoon season.
Magnitude 7.1 earthquake hits Mexico City on the anniversary of the 1985 quake.
Hurricane 'Maria' devastates Puerto Rico, destroying the electrical grid.
Magnitude 7.5 earthquake and tsunami strike Palu, Sulawesi, Indonesia.
Drought in the Sahel region leads to severe food insecurity.
Wildfires in the Pantanal wetlands reach record levels of destruction.
Flooding in the UK caused by Storms 'Ciara' and 'Dennis' destroys defenses.
Magnitude 6.0 earthquake hits Napa Valley, California, damaging wineries.
Hurricane 'Harvey' causes historic flooding in Houston, Texas.
Magnitude 7.8 earthquake hits Nepal, centered near Gorkha.
Cyclone 'Pam' devastates the island nation of Vanuatu.
Typhoon 'Haiyan' (Yolanda) brings catastrophic storm surge to Tacloban, Philippines.
Magnitude 9.0 earthquake and tsunami hit Tohoku region, Japan.
Magnitude 7.0 earthquake devitalizes Port-au-Prince, Haiti.
Magnitude 7.9 earthquake strikes Wenchuan, China.
Magnitude 9.1 Indian Ocean earthquake and tsunami kills 230,000.
Cyclone 'Emnati' makes landfall in Madagascar, the fourth in a month.
Magnitude 6.2 earthquake hits Central Italy, destroying the town of Amatrice.
Flooding in Bangladesh submerge 70% of the country during extreme monsoon.
Magnitude 6.0 earthquake strikes Sabah, Malaysia, near Mount Kinabalu.
Cyclone 'Gati' makes unprecedented landfall in Somalia.
Drought in the Lake Chad basin affects livelihoods of millions.
Wildfires in Chile burn through the region of Valparaíso.
Magnitude 6.6 earthquake hits Hokkaido, Japan, causing massive landslides.
Flooding in Kerala, India, is the worst in a century.
Magnitude 7.5 earthquake hits the Hindu Kush region, felt across South Asia.
Drought in Zimbabwe causes major crops to fail nationwide.
Cyclone 'Mekunu' brings record rainfall to Salalah, Oman.
Magnitude 8.3 earthquake hits Coquimbo, Chile, causing evacuations.
Flooding in the Balkan region leaves millions without electricity.
Wildfires in Oregon destroy multiple towns along the Cascades.
Magnitude 7.0 earthquake strikes Kumamoto, Japan.
Drought in Southern Africa declared a regional disaster.
Cyclone 'Keni' hits Fiji, causing flash flooding in Nadi.

Flooding in Peru caused by 'Coastal El Niño' destroys infrastructure.
Wildfires in Portugal's Pedrógão Grande cause dozens of fatalities.
Magnitude 6.4 earthquake hits Taiwan's Hualien County.
Drought in Morocco hits 40-year record in severity.
Cyclone 'Titli' causes massive landslides in Odisha, India.

Flooding in North Korea leads to critical food shortages.
Wildfires in the Northwest Territories of Canada force mass evacuations.
Magnitude 7.2 earthquake strikes off the coast of New Caledonia.
Drought in Afghanistan affects over 2 million people due to lack of snowmelt.
Cyclone 'Bulbul' makes landfall in India and Bangladesh.

Flooding in Venice reaches the highest 'Acqua Alta' since 1966.
Wildfires in Sweden reach the Arctic Circle during extreme heatwave.
Magnitude 7.0 earthquake hits Anchorage, Alaska, damaging roads.
Drought in the Mediterranean region predicted to become 'new normal'.
Cyclone 'Sarai' triggers flood warnings for the Fiji islands.

Flooding in Ethiopia displaces hundreds of thousands in the Somali region.
Wildfires in Turkey's Mediterranean coast destroy resort forests.

Drought in the Mekong River reaches critical levels for fish stocks.
Cyclone 'Maha' strengthens into an extremely severe storm in the Arabian Sea.

Flooding in Kenya caused by heavy rains kills over 100 people.

Flooding in the US Midwest breaches dozens of levees along the Missouri.
Wildfires in Bolivia's Chiquitania forest burn through 2 million hectares.

Drought in Central America's 'Dry Corridor' triggers migration.
Cyclone 'Kyarr' becomes the strongest storm in the Arabian Sea for 12 years.

Wildfires in Greenland burn through peatlands in the western coast.
